title: stelis cuencana
intro: Stelis cuencana is a type of orchid native to the Andean region of South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis cuencana include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Stelis cuencana can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or it can be used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal tonic.
